title: Rotate Image (Matrix 90 Degrees)
coreIdea: Rotate a square matrix 90 degrees clockwise in-place by first transposing the matrix (swap rows and columns), then reversing each row.
recognitionCues: asks to rotate a 2D matrix in-place, typically 90 degrees
approach: Transpose the matrix in-place: for i < j, swap matrix[i][j] with matrix[j][i]. Then reverse each row of the transposed matrix to achieve the clockwise rotation.
